defs: (fig.) related to the wife or another female family member
official who gained his position through the influence of a female relative

pinyin: qun2 dai4 zi1 ben3 zhu3 yi4

defs: (idiom) favoritism shown to sb because of the influence of the person's wife or other female relative
(idiom) (by extension) favoritism towards relatives, friends or associates
the practice of favoring sb because of the influence of the person's wife or other female relative
(by extension) culture of favoritism towards relatives, friends and associates
frame worn under a skirt; underskirt
variant of 裙襬|裙摆[qun2 bai3]
the edible gelatinous fringe of a softshell turtle's carapace
